{"title":"Network Module Design (2026-04-05)","status":"implemented-with-amendments","summary":"Established the 3D network graph module using 3d-force-graph. Created graphNodes and graphEdges Firestore collections. KnowledgeNode extends GraphNode with type='knowledge', entityId=null. Knowledge-entity links stored as graphEdges. syncFromStores() bootstraps from existing module stores. network store owns load(), createEdge(), deleteEdge(), createKnowledgeNode(), updateKnowledgeNode(), knowledgeFor() getter.","key_decisions":["Use 3d-force-graph (not vis-network)","graphNodes collection: all entity nodes + knowledge nodes","graphEdges collection: all relationships","KnowledgeNode is a GraphNode subtype (type='knowledge', entityId=null)","syncFromStores() runs once on first load, guarded by bootstrapped flag","network store has knowledgeFor(nodeId, minCertainty) getter","NodeType: person|project|task|behavior|meeting|team|coaching|knowledge","EdgeType values: member|assignee|contains|participant|references|related|custom"],"amended_by":"adr-knowledge-connections-2026-04-07"}

{"title":"Knowledge Connections Design (2026-04-07)","status":"in-progress","summary":"Knowledge becomes an independent domain. Extracted from network store into stores/knowledge.ts. New Firestore collections: knowledgeNodes and knowledgeEdges. Network store becomes a consumer/slave. {"title":"Core Application Architecture Principles (from CLAUDE.md + architecture.md)","status":"active","key_decisions":["Nuxt 4 + Vue 3 + Vuetify 3, templates in Pug, styles in SASS indented syntax","All state managed via Pinia stores (persist: true), one store per domain module","Firebase Firestore as sole database (no SQL).
